query:
-- Add is_public flag to existing chat_companions table
ALTER TABLE chat_companions ADD COLUMN is_public BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE;
ALTER TABLE chat_companions ADD COLUMN view_count INT DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE chat_companions ADD COLUMN like_count INT DEFAULT 0;

-- Create preset_marketplace table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS preset_marketplace (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  prompt_data JSON NOT NULL,
  category VARCHAR(100),
  tags TEXT,
  preview_image_url TEXT,
  is_public BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  like_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  use_count INT DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_user (user_id),
  INDEX idx_category (category),
  INDEX idx_public (is_public),
  INDEX idx_created (created_at)
);

-- Create character_likes table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS character_likes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  character_id INT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_like (user_id, character_id),
  INDEX idx_user (user_id),
  INDEX idx_character (character_id)
);

-- Create preset_likes table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS preset_likes (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  preset_id INT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_like (user_id, preset_id),
  INDEX idx_user (user_id),
  INDEX idx_preset (preset_id)
);

-- Create creator_follows table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creator_follows (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  follower_id INT NOT NULL,
  creator_id INT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_follow (follower_id, creator_id),
  INDEX idx_follower (follower_id),
  INDEX idx_creator (creator_id)
);

  preset_id INT NOT NULL,

-- Create creator_follows table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creator_follows (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  follower_id INT NOT NULL,
  creator_id INT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  INDEX idx_follower (follower_id),
  INDEX idx_creator (creator_id)
);
